title: Scott Ritter: Putin Just Called NATO's Bluff, Nuke-Ready Missile DESTROYS Ukraine ft. Mark Sleboda | War and Conflict | Before It's News
text:
Scott Ritter: Putin Just Called NATO's Bluff, Nuke-Ready Missile DESTROYS Ukraine ft. Mark Sleboda
Source: [Danny Haiphong](/v3/r2/?url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vQGdlb3BvbGl0aWNzaGFpcGhvbmc=)
In this explosive analysis, Scott Ritter and Mark Sleboda dive deep into Russia’s latest NUCLEAR-capable missile launch and its historic implications for Ukraine, NATO, and global security. Scot Ritter kicks off the discussion with a breakdown of he missile’s capabilities, the timing the launch, and how this sends a direct message to the US, UK and NATO amidst escalating tensions. Mark Sleboda concludes the conversation by giving expert geopolitical insights into Russia’s perspective, how NATO might respond, and what this signals about Russia’s evolving military strategy.
